$comment: Per-participant slug (from PDF basename). tieBreak: only when occurrence counts tie. alwaysPick: force winner (norm) for that matchup even if counts disagree — use after spot-check. Keys: sort both norms with localeCompare, join with | (or any order; import normalizes). On pdf:import, StrikeOut annotations are merged into alwaysPick first; entries here override auto strikeout.
